name: Kneeling Dumbbell Shoulders & Biceps Circuit
description: A dumbbell circuit targeting shoulders and biceps, performed kneeling to engage core stability. Includes curl and press variations for upper body strength.

activities.notes: Nice and low down, a lot of tension. Brace the rib cage.
Drive the knees, think of the grip of the elbow.
Palms towards up, full external rotation, proud chest. Each side.
Pressing away, back and return. Focus on top ends of front delts.

tips: All exercises performed kneeling on a mat
Brace core and rib cage throughout
